full_text:
Pei Xiu (Jiyan) 裴秀 (季彥)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Pei Xiu (裴秀), styledJiyan (季彥), was born in Wenxi county, Hedong commandery. Expert cartographer, close adviser to Sima Zhao and Sima Yan. Pei Xiu was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty. Pei Xiu lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
